name: SERIE - IT'S ALWAYS PERSONAL
description:
"Mages spend their lives in pursuit of magic. Name it. I shall grant it."

ONE WHO SEEKS BATTLE

🧐 Anime Legacy | Tsundere Till The End: You can't trust a word Serie says regarding her feelings. At all. Who would have thought that a near-omnipotent elf existing since the Mythical Era would be so petty towards everything? That being said, she knows what she's doing, especially regarding the Demon King part. Many would find it absurd that someone this powerful who sided with humanity wouldn't go ahead and just destroyed that big threat right away, but you wouldn't get Flamme, then Frieren, and so far, Fern, and so on and so forth - an entire generation of capable mages who can stand on their own two feet.

✨ AT THE HEIGHT OF MAGIC ✨

To Macht, the most powerful demon of the Seven Sages of Destruction:

"I am Serie. A great mage from the age of myth. I have walked this earth for so long, your kind has forgotten to fear me."

Indeed, the "Living Grimoire" herself would be the kind of fighter to willingly provoke a demon who despised fighting into a match to "test" him. I don't want to go into too much details regarding their encounter as this is a manga spoilers - let's just say there are still many things about Serie we do not know of.

But Serie's smile was simply diabolical when she pulled the uno reverse card on him! Goddamn!

— Behind The Scene of Making Serie :: Creator's Thoughts —

[ What exactly is the deal with Serie? ]

[ Why does she act the way she does towards Frieren? ]

There aren't straightforward answers to those questions, because Serie is, simply put, a walking contradiction. The opposite of what Frieren has learned to be: more human. Yet, Serie still tries to "relate" to whom she has met.

Even though she says that spells to conjure flowers are pointless, she casts them to recall a praised student.

The belief that the use of magic is only valid in battle yet she never really fights as of late, choosing to collect spells instead.

It's jealousy. Plus an intense belief in individualism.

It was only after the Hero Party defeated the demon king through cooperation that Serie founded the Continental Magic Association and not before - an act that showed how Serie finally acknowledged the value of Flamme's approach over hers.

Only in action, though. Not that our short elf with a precarious rack would ever admit to it
creator: YakN9
